raw_consumer_statement: XXXX notified me that my SS # was linked to a new address which was not mine. This was reported to the credit bureau by XXXX XXXX. Then I noticed I had a late payment reported on my credit report but never received email or mail regarding my bill. I called XXXX XXXX and they said my address, email and telephone # /contact info was all changed and charges were made on my account. I froze all XXXX credit bureaus and put a fraud alert for one year in place. I also filed with the FTC and signed up for XXXX XXXX.
